blocks.headers: Item, Description, Qty, Unit, Rate, Amount
blocks.rows:
1, Enterprise Architecture Consulting — System design and technical architecture for cloud migration including multi-region deployment strategy and disaster recovery planning, 120, hrs, $285.00, $34200.00
2, Senior Software Engineering — Full-stack development of customer portal and API gateway with OAuth 2.0 integration and role-based access control, 240, hrs, $225.00, $54000.00
3, DevOps & Infrastructure — Kubernetes cluster setup and CI/CD pipeline configuration across 3 environments (dev/staging/prod) with automated rollback, 80, hrs, $245.00, $19600.00
4, Data Migration Services — ETL pipeline development for migrating 14.2M records from legacy Oracle DB to PostgreSQL with validation and reconciliation, 60, hrs, $265.00, $15900.00
5, Quality Assurance — Comprehensive test suite development including unit tests (1847 cases) and integration tests (342 scenarios) and performance benchmarks, 90, hrs, $195.00, $17550.00
6, Project Management — Agile program management with bi-weekly stakeholder demos and risk mitigation planning and vendor coordination, 45, hrs, $275.00, $12375.00
7, Security Audit & Compliance — SOC 2 Type II readiness assessment and penetration testing and vulnerability remediation across all public-facing endpoints, 1, fixed, $18500.00, $18500.00
8, Training & Knowledge Transfer — 5-day on-site workshop for Meridian engineering team covering system architecture and operational runbooks and incident procedures, 1, fixed, $12500.00, $12500.00

blocks.text: **Payment Terms:** Net 30 days from invoice date. A late payment fee of 1.5% per month (18% APR) will be applied to balances outstanding beyond the due date.
**Dispute Resolution:** Any billing disputes must be reported in writing within 15 business days of invoice receipt. Undisputed portions remain due per original terms.
**Governing Law:** This invoice and all services rendered are governed by the laws of the State of California, United States. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of San Francisco County.
This invoice is generated electronically and is valid without signature. For questions regarding this invoice, contact billing@nextera.global or call +1 (415) 555-0142 ext. 3.
This invoice covers Phase 2 of the Enterprise Platform Migration engagement (SOW-MT-2026-002), executed between January 15 and March 31, 2026. Key deliverables completed:

blocks.items:
Cloud-native architecture deployed across AWS us-east-1 and eu-west-1 regions with 99.97% uptime SLA
Customer portal launched with 12,400 active users in first 2 weeks — zero critical bugs reported
Data migration completed — 14.2M records migrated with 99.998% accuracy (3 records required manual review)
CI/CD pipeline delivering 47 deployments in March with average deploy time of 4.2 minutes
SOC 2 Type II audit evidence package prepared — formal audit scheduled for April 2026
Full knowledge transfer completed — Meridian team independently deployed 8 releases in final week
